sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Again the colors swapped back!
- Before: G (dark gray) at [52, 28], W (white) at [59, 25]
- After: W (white) at [52, 28], G (dark gray) at [59, 25]
So clicking the magenta center swapped the colors of the white diamond and dark gray diamond back to their original positions! The purple square and magenta stayed put.
So the mechanic seems to be:
- Clicking magenta center swaps the colors of the white diamond and dark gray diamond
- Clicking the dark gray diamond also swaps them
Wait, let me reconsider. Maybe the game is about getting the colors right. Let me think about what the initial state was:
- Initial: White diamond at top-left area, dark gray diamond at bottom-right
- After first click (purple ring): White diamond moved to ring position
- After clicking magenta: white diamond followed purple square, purple square moved
- After clicking dark gray diamond: colors swapped
- After clicking magenta: colors swapped back
So the swap is triggered by clicking either the magenta center or the dark gray diamond. But clicking magenta when the purple square was still moving also moved the purple square. Now that the purple square is at its final position, clicking magenta just swaps colors.
Hmm, but the level isn't completed. Maybe the goal is to have all objects in specific positions with specific colors? Or maybe I need to get the purple square to overlap with the dark gray diamond?
Wait, let me look at the image more carefully. The white diamond (W) is now at [52, 28] and the dark gray (G) is at [59, 25]. The purple square is at [54, 26] with magenta at [56, 27].
Looking at the image, the purple square is between the white diamond and the dark gray diamond. Maybe I need to click on the purple square to merge it with one of them?
Actually, let me reconsider the whole game. Maybe the goal isn't about moving the purple square to the dark gray diamond. Maybe it's about something else entirely. Let me look at the purple ring - it's still there at the top. Maybe I need to interact with it again?
Let me try clicking on the purple ring center again to see what happens now.

- White diamond at [52, 28], dark gray at [59, 25].
- The purple ring at top is still present.
- Level not complete. Need to find the right combination.
